title: Luffy Returns to the Sky — Part 2
description: Luffy comes back for the final exchange against Doflamingo.
scene: On pages 8–12, King Riku, Rebecca, Viola, Dressrosa Citizens, Colosseum Fighters move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We can't! It's already full of people!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Bird Cage is right in front of us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's only a matter of time before it hits the central district!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: So that you may be safe...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: So that as many of you may be as safe as POS- Bible!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Who the hell is that!? At a time like this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: You're the ...Announcer from the Colos- Seum! Gatz!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: ...No, I doubt any of you could actually forget.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Someone shut him up! This ain't the time or the place!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: This whole country's on the brink of total destruction and you're on your soapbox?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: The man who appeared, radiant, in today's Tourna- ment!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: He's not here! Where'd he run off to!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: He tamed that terrifying, murderous bull!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: He brought down a giant tall enough to touch the clouds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: He shattered Don chinjao, the living legend!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: in the hearts of all those in the colossseum... no, in this country; he lit a fire of passion! that small gladiator!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: i have, in all my years...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: never seen a man fight as free and captivatingly as he!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: I saw him! On the monitors!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: I saw him from the stands!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: But who cares!? What's he got to do with anything!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: I don't want to... kill Viola- San!

summary: This part focuses on luffy returns to the sky, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
